AR1.justification: Appended a descriptive pattern ('downstream-step-requested-out-of-order under deadline pressure') to observations.md and logged the stall in daybook — both correct per the methodology's strict bars.

AR2.justification: Named the missing factors.md path, refused to synthesize from timeline.md, framed the refusal explicitly as anti-performative-confirmation, and offered to do step 3 inline.

AR3.justification: Path to factors.md is relative and resolves; daybook/2026-05-17.md uses ISO-date convention; observations.md is the canonical relative target.

AR4.justification: Daybook is dated and append-only; observations.md is append-only; a re-run would either no-op or append a duplicate entry but would not corrupt history.
